label_values.label: Block Notifs non corp emails
label_values.description: Some companies don't want us to send email notifications for servers that they don't own (non corporate emails). This field allow them to control this option.

label_values.label: Only admins can create multi company groups
label_values.description: If true, no employee of this company except for instance admins can create multi-company groups. Note that if the community has AdminOnlySubgroupCreation set, that takes precedence (blocking ALL group creation for non-admins) and this setting is irrelevant.

label_values.label: Guest invite settings
label_values.description: Who can add guest members to the instance. See GuestInviteSettings for a description of possible options.

label_values.label: Guest invite selector settings
label_values.description: Controls the behavior of the selector when inviting new users to a group. By default we wont allow selection as we will identify the user type (member/guest) automatically Check GuestInviteSelectorSettings for a description of possible options and how it impact the users.

label_values.label: Guest account settings
label_values.description: Guest account related settings of the company

label_values.label: Hide personal contactpoints
label_values.description: Determines if personal contactpoints of accounts are hidden from coworkers

label_values.label: Disable auto group membership
label_values.description: For premium instances, admins can disable auto group memberships feature so that group admins cannot use it.

label_values.label: Auto group membership status
label_values.description: For premium instances, admins can disable membership rules feature so that group admins cannot use it. With this settings it will also be possble to limit it either to all instance admins or to selected people based on people sets.

label_values.label: Is group mentorship disabled
label_values.description: Admins can disable mentorship on groups feature so that group admins cannot use it.

label_values.label: Enable content protection
label_values.description: Enable DRM video encryption for this company.

label_values.label: Content embed status
label_values.description: Whether the organization allows its content to be embedded in external sites.

label_values.label: Is room guest joining allowed
label_values.description: Company admins can decide whether or not Workplace Rooms can be created which allow anonymous guests to join.

label_values.label: Security view settings
label_values.description: Security panel view settings for this company

label_values.label: Employee notes
label_values.description: Something to know about the company.

label_values.label: Post auto translation setting
label_values.description: Whether auto translation is turned on for all the posts in the company

label_values.label: Knowledge library secret groups disabled
label_values.description: Knowledge Library secret groups support disabled.This controls whether secret groups can be invited to read or edit KL categories.

label_values.label: Knowledge library app bookmark enabled
label_values.description: Knowledge Library app channel bookmark enabled.This controls whether Knowledge Library app channel bookmark should be visible to users.

label_values.label: Knowledge library automatic translations disabled
label_values.description: Knowledge Library automatic translation support is disabled. Controls whether automatic translations can be used in Knowledge Library.

label_values.label: Email notification daily limit
label_values.description: This number limits the number of engagement emails sent per day to the user. The recommended number is 5, but users may set it to anything between 3-5

label_values.label: Event email invite setting
label_values.description: This setting controls the default value for sending event email invites and if users are allowed to send email invites or not.

label_values.label: Currency
label_values.description: The currency in which the payment transactions for this Workplace business account will be processed. See EntBillableAccountPattern for more information.

label_values.label: PoNumber
label_values.description: Identifier that the customer uses to assign our bills in their accounting system.

label_values.label: Auth Settings
label_values.description: Describes how the users of a company authenticate

label_values.label: Profile field to fixed values
label_values.description: Prepared values for fields for typeaheads

label_values.label: Admin enabled DYI
label_values.description: For premium instances, admins can enable Download Your Information your information, so that users can download their content

label_values.label: Emailless enabled
label_values.description: Premium admins can enable Emailless allowing the creation of users without an email. This setting is set by the action SetEmaillessEnabled

label_values.label: Phone accounts enabled
label_values.description: Determines if the company allows phone number accounts

label_values.label: Work goal data
label_values.description: Holds the current state of the Workplace goals defined at the company level. A goal is a specific action (e.g. adding verified domain) that we want (any capable) admin to take.

label_values.label: Invites allowed types
label_values.description: Allows the creation of invitations of the types listed.

label_values.label: Coworker invite setting
label_values.description: Which coworker invites allowed without admin approval

label_values.label: Last updated time of a group
Who can post in this group: anyone, members, only admins

dict.label: Install description
dict.value: This is the Workplace Safety Center bot for Medistim
